{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230453055F8FC5CA0408BC2C1A58"}"},"total":819},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7338644972954256190","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有条有理，很好看，多更新[赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708664494,"group_id":"7328421490922097726","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书多了，就想要个完美的幻想世界，来弥补内心的幻想","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/yE1FB+Ti04fZwaKJnCqX6GSqbjmErCyDuv0Nodzd3r","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3420e6045ac443fbae86e0dc9fc2ff83~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794143&x-signature=VFI%2Bdy86VlYA7FrWROfTBeMcIpQ%3D","user_id":"4195377148602024","user_name":"毅鸿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4195377148602024","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7328421490922097726","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+多女主+非综武】提前说好，不喜勿入！
一道闪电，赵朔穿越成为宋哲宗赵煦本不存在的兄弟，我大哥是大宋皇帝，我怕谁？！
你说什么？这里是天龙世界！
赵朔反手拜师扫地僧，习得易筋经神功，少林七十二绝技，获得无崖子七十年内力，横推武林，镇压一切不服！
乔峰：三弟，原来你是大宋襄王，藏得可真深啊。
段誉：妹夫，过分了嗷，你是和我有啥愁啥恨，都快把我妹妹包圆了！！
慕容复：有的人啊，出生就是牛马。有的人，出生就在罗马！！赵朔，夺我表妹，毁我大业，我慕容复此生和你势不两立！
鸠摩智：阿弥陀佛，王爷武功精妙，小僧佩服之至。
赵煦：老弟啊，你给我解释解释！这个什么亚洲洲长是啥意思？咱大宋啥时候变成日不落帝国了？
赵朔对此表示，既然我来了，靖康之耻绝不可能！辽国、西夏算什么？我要带着大宋的铁骑打下大大的领土！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/da9d474053f6e436aef60b09762b838b","author":"残月断星","author_id":"","book_id":"7328421490922097726","book_name":"重生天龙：开局拜师扫地僧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7328766892628263486","read_count":"35207","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1527308"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"1012","tags":"男频衍生,武侠,穿越,无敌,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9508a4cf1d9ac394fb6eeca2cc465619~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779396785&x-signature=KwkuzTGL7B%2FBBVcFUWlUJwmPjeo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3503491082619468","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"54"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230453055F8FC5CA0408BC2C1A58"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count
